data.title: AVAX price falls 8% to $21.95, testing key support amid ETF buzz and $250M RWA push.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Avalanche (AVAX) is currently priced at $21.95, representing an 8% decrease. This decline has led to the testing of crucial support levels, despite previous positive momentum due to anticipation surrounding ETFs and a $250 million initiative focused on reducing risk-weighted assets.

data.title: PotisEdge maintains Tier 1 ranking by BNEF for energy storage fifth time in a row in Q3 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on August 1, 2025, Bloomberg New Energy Finance (BNEF) unveiled its latest report, the BNEF Energy Storage Tier 1 List for the third quarter of 2025. This list ranks companies within the energy storage sector based on various criteria. Notably, PotisEdge has maintained its position as a Tier 1 Energy Storage company on this prestigious list. BNEF is a widely respected research institution specializing in the new energy industry, and their recognition of PotisEdge underscores the company's continued success and leadership in the sector.

data.title: Digital Asset Treasury Companies (DATCOs) collectively hold over $100 billion in cryptocurrencies, with 791,662 BTC and 1.3 million ETH among them. The rise of DATCOs is influencing Bitcoin's market dynamics, with Strategy leading with over 600,000 BTC worth $71.8 billion. Bitcoin prices are being influenced by equity markets due to these companies using capital raised through equity programs to acquire more assets.
data.description: A new class of public companies known as Digital Asset Treasury Companies (DATCOs) are accumulating crypto assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum as a core business strategy. Collectively, these DATCOs now hold over $100 billion in cryptocurrencies. Research by Galaxy Research shows that DATCOs hold around 791,662 BTC and over 1.3 million ETH, representing nearly 4% of Bitcoin's circulating supply and more than 1% of Ethereum's. The majority of these holdings are concentrated in a few firms, with Strategy leading with over 600,000 BTC worth $71.8 billion, accounting for over 70% of all Bitcoin held by public treasury companies. DATCOs are influencing crypto markets by using equity market dynamics to raise capital through mechanisms like At-the-Market (ATM) equity programs and Private Investments in Public Equity (PIPEs), strengthening their equity premium and attracting further inflows to acquire more digital assets. Companies like Strategy and Metaplanet have utilized this strategy successfully. This new financial structure signifies a shift where Bitcoin prices are increasingly influenced by these DATCOs in the equity market.

data.title: Extreme Networks plans Investor Day for Nov 10 and to participate in conferences in Aug & Sep 2025.
data.description: Extreme Networks, based in Morrisville, North Carolina, revealed plans to hold its Investor Day on November 10, with investor conferences scheduled for August and September 2025. The events aim to provide insights into the company's performance and future prospects, attracting a significant number of stakeholders.

data.title: Trucker Path's 4th National Truck Driver Appreciation Sweepstakes honors drivers with industry sponsors.
data.description: Trucker Path has organized an event in Phoenix on August 1, 2025, to honor the nation's truck drivers. As the top mobile app for North American truckers, they have gathered industry sponsors to recognize these vital workers. This marks the fourth annual National Truck Driver Celebration, highlighting the contribution of these individuals.

data.title: Upcoming online training course on verification and validation for pharmaceutical, diagnostic, and biologics fields on September 11-12, 2025.
data.description: A new training session titled "Verification and Validation - Product, Equipment/Process, Software and QMS" has been included in the offerings of a Dublin-based company. This seminar aims to help regulated companies in reviewing and adjusting their Master Validation Planning and Plan(s). While the training is centered around Medical Devices, the principles discussed are applicable to individuals and businesses in the Pharmaceutical, Diagnostic, and Biologics sectors. The training will be beneficial for those striving to achieve regulatory compliance in their respective fields.

data.title: TELUS Digital reports Q2 2025 results, showing revenue growth. Controlled by TELUS Corporation. Figures in USD.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, TELUS Digital Experience (NYSE and TSX: TIXT), a prominent global technology firm focusing on digital customer experiences, announced its financial outcomes for the quarter and half-year concluding on June 30, 2025. TELUS Corporation (TSX: T, NYSE: TU) holds the majority shares of TELUS Digital. The financial figures presented in this report, as well as in all TELUS Digital reports, are denoted in U.S. dollars unless specified otherwise.

data.title: Butterfly Network reports Q2 2025 financial results. Quarter 2 marks one year since the launch of Butterfly iQ3, says CEO.
data.description: In Burlington, Massachusetts & New York, Butterfly Network, Inc. (NYSE: BFLY) shared its financial outcomes for Q2, 2025, and a business summary. The company, revolutionizing healthcare with portable ultrasound tech and user-friendly software, revealed that Q2 coincided with a year post the launch of Butterfly iQ3. Joseph DeVivo, the President, CEO, and Chairman of Butterfly, expressed his thoughts on the progress.

data.title: TransAlta (TSX: TA) reports strong Q2 2025 results, reaffirms guidance, and advances strategic priorities.
data.description: TransAlta Corporation, a company listed on both TSX (TA) and NYSE (TAC), released its financial results for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The report was made public on August 1, 2025, in Calgary, Alberta.
